title: Strawberry Salt & Pepper Shakers | Summer Fruit Shaped Salt and Pepper Pots | Novelty Ceramic Cruet Set with Tray
features: SALT & PEPPER SHAKERS | These strawberry salt and pepper shakers add a burst of fruity fun to your table, perfect for brightening up daily mealtimes
FUN FOR ANY SETTING | Ideal for everyday dining, picnics or garden parties - this fruity cruet set brings a summery twist to any occasion
CHEERFUL CERAMIC DESIGN | Made from glossy ceramic with realistic textures and vibrant colours, eye-catching and built to last
COMPACT & CONVENIENT | Comes with a matching ceramic tray for neat display and easy passing around the table
PERFECTLY SIZED & GIFT-READY | Each pot is approx. 8cml, tray 14cm long. Beautifully boxed, ideal gift for birthdays or housewarmings
